name: Diana's Chocolate Sheet Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Combine the sugar, flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a large mixing bowl. Mix well. Heat the butter and water in a saucepan until boiling. Pour over the dry ingredients and mix. Beat in buttermilk, eggs, and vanilla. Pour the thin batter into a greased and floured 15x10-inch pan. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes. Serve warm or cold.
FROSTING: Combine the butter, cocoa, and milk. Heat to boiling. Pour over sugar and nuts. Mix well. Spread on the hot cake.
NOTE: I like to substitute strong coffee for the milk and add 1/2 tsp vanilla to the frosting. This cake is reminiscent of "Texas Brownies."
